Header.name: Geisiel Melo
Header.description: Building exceptional digital experiences is my specialty as a developer.

paragraph.p1: I’m someone driven by challenges and committed to delivering the best results in the shortest time possible. For me, it’s not just about creating something functional; I strive to go further, combining attractive design, intuitive usability, and flawless performance — both in the interface and the code.
paragraph.p2: Currently, I work as a web developer at UniFTC, specializing in accessibility and performance. In recent months, I’ve been deeply involved in building websites, APIs, and integrations, ensuring that every project runs smoothly and provides users with a seamless and exceptional experience.
paragraph.p3: My journey began by developing solutions for self-employed professionals and small business owners. That period was transformative, allowing me to explore various technologies and understand the unique needs of each client, shaping the way I approach projects today.
paragraph.p4: In my free time, I enjoy recharging by playing games with friends or diving into great TV shows.

c1.title: Full Stack Developer · UniFTC
c1.description: Development of websites with a focus on accessibility and performance. | Creation of robust and functional APIs. | Integration of systems to ensure efficient communication between different platforms. | Ensuring that all projects deliver a seamless and exceptional experience to users. | Problem-solving and process optimization to keep projects running smoothly.
c1.tags: Languages: TypeScript, Python, PHP; Frontend: React, Next, TailwindCSS; Backend: Node, Nest, REST; Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Redis; Cloud: AWS, Google Cloud, Cloudflare; AI & Tools: LLM, MCP, HubSpot

c2.title: Full Stack Developer · Freelancer
c2.description: Full-stack development of web applications using modern technologies such as MongoDB, Express, React, Node, and TypeScript. | Development of APIs and interfaces with a focus on user experience enhancement. | Implementation of robust programming practices, including version control with Git. | Active participation in all stages of application development cycle, from planning to launch.
c2.tags: Languages: TypeScript, Python; Frontend: React, TailwindCSS; Backend: Express; Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, Redis; Tools: cPanel, Linux

c3.title: Front-end Developer · Loja TrapStar
c3.description: Developed, maintained, and deployed production code for client websites, primarily utilizing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. | Collaborated  with the design team to promote a cohesive team environment and ensure consistent user experiences. | Performed quality tests to ensure cross browser compatibility, speed and responsiveness.
c3.tags: Languages: JavaScript, PHP; Frontend: HTML, CSS, jQuery, Bootstrap; Tools: cPanel, Linux

c1.title: UNEX | MED
c1.description: A dedicated platform for UNEX medical courses, featuring course details, enrollment flows, and institutional information with a focus on performance and accessibility.
c1.tags: Next.js, TypeScript, Node, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn

c2.title: Vestibular UniFTC
c2.description: The official entrance exam portal for UniFTC, providing candidates with information, registration flows, and results in a clear and accessible interface.

c3.title: MegaRevisão
c3.description: A live streaming platform for ENEM revision classes developed for REDE UniFTC, helping students prepare for Brazil's national high school exam in real time.

c4.title: Transferência Externa Unex
c4.description: A streamlined web application for external transfer candidates at UNEX, guiding users through the enrollment process with a clear and intuitive flow.
